steps.title: Spot Diego’s hope
steps.content: The passage notes Diego’s hope to meet the sisters and also to meet their father, the poet, at Mamá’s house.

steps.title: Match the hope to the choices
steps.content:
Choice D (‘Diego anticipates having the opportunity to be introduced to both the sisters and their father.’) states that Diego expects to be introduced to both the sisters and their father, matching that hope.
The other three options describe motives—being taught by the sisters, seeking mentorship from their father, or sharing his poems—that are never mentioned as his reason for coming.

That confirms D is correct.
